items.claim: Conor McGregor has been inactive for five years.
items.quote: there is a half a decade absence

items.claim: Conor McGregor is coming off a devastating injury.
items.quote: McGregor is coming off of a devastating injury

items.claim: Conor McGregor is on a two-fight losing streak.
items.quote: he's on a two-fight losing streak.

items.claim: Conor McGregor showed signs of being winded in his fights at 170 pounds.
items.quote: I think about his last fights at 170. In his physical prime, he fought Nate Diaz at 170 and he looked winded.

items.claim: Conor McGregor's wrestling has never been the bread and butter of his game.
items.quote: McGregor wrestling. It has never been the bread and butter of his game.

items.claim: Max Holloway is the most hit fighter in UFC history.
items.quote: Max is the most hit fighter of all time

items.claim: Conor McGregor has not been punched in the face in five years.
items.quote: McGregor hasn't been punched in the face in five years.
